case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SANDRA COLEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, SANDRA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION (CCCP 664.6) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLEMAN, SANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 SIXTH STREET, #309, SF, TOGETHER WITH ALL ATTENDANT STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS $1,310.00 RENT, $1,500.00 COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY'S FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,810.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT"
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT COLEMAN, SANDRA
DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL VALUE $13.80 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, SANDRA
